scripts.build: npm run build:customer && npm run build:system
scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && vitest run --root . shared/trace-presentation.test.ts shared/trace-graph-selection.test.ts shared/trace-graph-state.test.ts customer-admin/src/landing-motion.test.ts customer-admin/src/simulation-workflow.test.ts && node --test scripts/admin-boundary.test.mjs && node scripts/assert-ui-regressions.mjs && node --test src/mobile-shell.test.mjs && npm run test:landing
